mano_cua.result_summary: View菜单中主题切换按钮标签不会动态变化。浅色模式下标签正确显示'Dark Mode'，但切换到深色模式后重新打开菜单，标签仍显示'Dark Mode'而非期望的'Light Mode'。主题切换功能本身正常（背景确实变化），但按钮标签始终固定为'Dark Mode'
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Bug confirmed: In View menu, theme toggle button label stays 'Dark Mode' regardless of current theme. Light mode → label 'Dark Mode' ✓; switch to Dark mode → open menu again → label still 'Dark Mode' ✗ (expected 'Light Mode'). Switch back to Light mode → label 'Dark Mode' ✓. The label never dynamically updates to reflect current state.
